message:
fix(web): fix getCapabilitiesSummary() empty lines and type accuracy

- Fix getCapabilitiesSummary() to preserve empty lines as visual
  separators - previous .filter(Boolean) incorrectly removed them
- Fix getSequenceTransportStrategy() return type to match reality
  (removed 'clone' which was never returned)
